class.name: PlayFabMatchmakingMember
class.brief_description: One local member in a matchmaking ticket.
class.description: Wraps the [PlayFabUser] and optional JSON-serializable attributes used by [method PlayFabMultiplayer.create_match_ticket_async].

members.member: Signed-in PlayFab user whose entity handle is added to the ticket.
Per-member matchmaking attributes serialized to JSON.
